calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Off Calendar

Application For Judgment Establishing Title To Real Property Under The Destroyed Records Relief Law Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Lee Bardellini, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Haig Mardikian.
Plaintiff Haig Mardikian is present.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Roy Tong and Wyman B. Tong,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Benjamin Ron is Sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

On January 10, 2012, the date of commencement of this action, Haig Mardikian was the owner and fee simple absolute, and in the actual and peaceful possession of owner of all that real property set forth and described herein as Exhibit B, and all that certail real property decribed herein as referred to as the "gap property," which is more particularly described as exhibit C attached hereto and diagramed in Exhibit c1 attached here to.

All named defendants and all persons are perpetually barred and joined and estopped from asserting or setting up any estate, right title, interest, or claim in or to the "gap property," as described and set forth in Exhibits C and C1 hereto, or any part thereof, whether legal or equitable, present or future, vested or contingent, or mortgages or liens of any description.

Finding of fact, conclusions of law, and judgment signed in Court.
